options.content:
# 💶 My money — everything in one place
Plain words, one calm colour. All amounts in euros (1.234,56). Updates by itself (bank sync every morning; page refreshes every 30 min).

panels.title: 🛟 Breathing room before the overdraft wall  (€)

targets.rawSql: SELECT ROUND((SELECT v FROM budget_plan WHERE k='overdraft_limit')+(SELECT base_balance FROM balances WHERE account_id='ing-checking' ORDER BY as_of DESC LIMIT 1),2) v

panels.title: 🏦 In the bank now — checking  (€)

targets.rawSql: SELECT ROUND(base_balance,2) v FROM balances WHERE account_id='ing-checking' ORDER BY as_of DESC LIMIT 1

panels.title: 💧 Total in all synced accounts  (€)

targets.rawSql: SELECT ROUND(SUM(base_balance),2) AS Liquid FROM (SELECT base_balance, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY account_id ORDER BY as_of DESC) rn FROM balances) z WHERE rn=1

panels.title: 🤝 I owe friends — Ilias + Christos  (€)

targets.rawSql: SELECT (SELECT v FROM budget_plan WHERE k='debt_friends') AS v

options.content: ## ② THIS MONTH — am I on plan?

panels.title: 📊 Spent so far this month  (bar fills toward my monthly plan)

targets.rawSql: SELECT ROUND(-SUM(t.base_amount),2) FROM transactions t JOIN categories c ON t.category=c.slug WHERE c.kind='expense' AND (t.account_id IN ('ing-checking','ing-card','paypal') OR (t.account_id LIKE 'ing-sav-%' AND t.account_id<>'ing-sav-k797')) AND NOT (t.account_id='ing-checking' AND t.payee_raw LIKE '%Incasso ING creditcard%') AND t.booked_date>=DATE_FORMAT(CURDATE(),'%Y-%m-01')

panels.title: ✅ Spare each month if I follow the plan  (€)

targets.rawSql: SELECT (SELECT v FROM budget_plan WHERE k='income_monthly')-(SELECT v FROM budget_plan WHERE k='REDACTED_6c219e94') AS v

panels.title: 📥 Income landed this month  (€)

targets.rawSql: SELECT COALESCE(ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN t.base_amount>0 AND c.kind='income' THEN t.base_amount END),2),0) v FROM transactions t LEFT JOIN categories c ON t.category=c.slug WHERE (t.account_id IN ('ing-checking','ing-card','paypal') OR (t.account_id LIKE 'ing-sav-%' AND t.account_id<>'ing-sav-k797')) AND t.booked_date>=DATE_FORMAT(CURDATE(),'%Y-%m-01')

panels.title: 🛒 Biggest spending areas this month  (€)

targets.rawSql: SELECT CASE t.category WHEN 'online-shopping' THEN 'Online shopping' WHEN 'card-spending' THEN 'Card bill' WHEN 'groceries' THEN 'Food (groceries)' WHEN 'mortgage' THEN 'Home (mortgage)' WHEN 'REDACTED_358be28b' THEN 'Apps & subscriptions' WHEN 'electronics-homelab' THEN 'Gear / electronics' WHEN 'takeaway-delivery' THEN 'Takeaway' WHEN 'loans' THEN 'Loan payments' WHEN 'electric-gas' THEN 'Electric & gas' WHEN 'greece-family' THEN 'Family (Greece)' WHEN 'internet-mobile' THEN 'Internet / mobile' WHEN 'supplements-fitness' THEN 'Supplements' WHEN 'health-insurance-nn' THEN 'Health insurance' WHEN 'water-dunea' THEN 'Water' ELSE t.category END AS `Where it goes`, ROUND(-SUM(t.base_amount),2) AS `Spent` FROM transactions t JOIN categories c ON t.category=c.slug WHERE c.kind='expense' AND (t.account_id IN ('ing-checking','ing-card','paypal') OR (t.account_id LIKE 'ing-sav-%' AND t.account_id<>'ing-sav-k797')) AND NOT (t.account_id='ing-checking' AND t.payee_raw LIKE '%Incasso ING creditcard%') AND t.booked_date>=DATE_FORMAT(CURDATE(),'%Y-%m-01') GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 2 DESC LIMIT 5

options.content: ## ③ WHERE IT GOES — averages & commitments

panels.title: 🛒 Where my money goes — average per month, last 6 months  (€)

targets.rawSql: SELECT CASE t.category WHEN 'online-shopping' THEN 'Online shopping' WHEN 'card-spending' THEN 'Paying credit card' WHEN 'groceries' THEN 'Food (groceries)' WHEN 'mortgage' THEN 'Home (mortgage)' WHEN 'REDACTED_358be28b' THEN 'Apps & subscriptions' WHEN 'electronics-homelab' THEN 'Gear / electronics' WHEN 'takeaway-delivery' THEN 'Takeaway' WHEN 'loans' THEN 'Loan payments' WHEN 'electric-gas' THEN 'Electric & gas' WHEN 'greece-family' THEN 'Family (Greece)' WHEN 'supplements-fitness' THEN 'Supplements' WHEN 'health-insurance-nn' THEN 'Health insurance' ELSE t.category END AS `Where it goes`, ROUND(-SUM(t.base_amount)/6,0) AS `Per month` FROM transactions t JOIN categories c ON t.category=c.slug WHERE c.kind='expense' AND (t.account_id IN ('ing-checking','ing-card','paypal') OR (t.account_id LIKE 'ing-sav-%' AND t.account_id<>'ing-sav-k797')) AND NOT (t.account_id='ing-checking' AND t.payee_raw LIKE '%Incasso ING creditcard%') AND t.booked_date>=DATE_SUB(CURDATE(),INTERVAL 6 MONTH) GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 2 DESC LIMIT 10

panels.title: 📋 My subscriptions — real, from Wallos

targets.rawSql: SELECT name AS `Subscription`, CONCAT('€ ', FORMAT(monthly_eur,2,'de_DE')) AS `Per month`, cycle_label AS `Billed` FROM wallos_subs WHERE active=1 ORDER BY monthly_eur DESC LIMIT 14

panels.title: 🧾 Biggest expenses this month  (real spending, no transfers)

targets.rawSql: SELECT DATE_FORMAT(booked_date,'%e %b') AS `When`, CONCAT('€ ',FORMAT(-base_amount,2,'de_DE')) AS `Amount`, LEFT(payee_raw,34) AS `Paid to` FROM transactions WHERE (account_id IN ('ing-checking','ing-card','paypal') OR (account_id LIKE 'ing-sav-%' AND account_id<>'ing-sav-k797')) AND base_amount<0 AND (category IS NULL OR category<>'transfer') AND booked_date>=DATE_FORMAT(CURDATE(),'%Y-%m-01') ORDER BY base_amount ASC LIMIT 8

panels.title: 🤝 Months to clear Ilias + Christos  (if I follow the plan)

targets.rawSql: SELECT CEIL((SELECT v FROM budget_plan WHERE k='debt_friends') / GREATEST((SELECT v FROM budget_plan WHERE k='income_monthly')-(SELECT v FROM budget_plan WHERE k='REDACTED_6c219e94'),1)) AS m

panels.title: 📆 Net — last full month  (€)

targets.rawSql: SELECT ROUND(SUM(base_amount),2) AS Net FROM transactions WHERE (account_id IN ('ing-checking','ing-card') OR (account_id LIKE 'ing-sav-%' AND account_id<>'ing-sav-k797')) AND booked_date >= DATE_FORMAT(DATE_SUB(CURDATE(),INTERVAL 1 MONTH),'%Y-%m-01') AND booked_date < DATE_FORMAT(CURDATE(),'%Y-%m-01')

panels.title: 📆 Net — last 13 months  (€)

targets.rawSql: SELECT ROUND(SUM(base_amount),2) AS Net FROM transactions WHERE (account_id IN ('ing-checking','ing-card') OR (account_id LIKE 'ing-sav-%' AND account_id<>'ing-sav-k797')) AND $__timeFilter(booked_date)

panels.title: 📊 Net per month — what actually stayed  (€)

targets.rawSql: SELECT STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(DATE_FORMAT(booked_date,'%Y-%m'),'-01'),'%Y-%m-%d') AS time, ROUND(SUM(base_amount),2) AS Net FROM transactions WHERE (account_id IN ('ing-checking','ing-card') OR (account_id LIKE 'ing-sav-%' AND account_id<>'ing-sav-k797')) AND $__timeFilter(booked_date) GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

panels.title: 📈 Cumulative trajectory — am I climbing or sinking  (€)

targets.rawSql: SELECT t AS time, ROUND(SUM(net) OVER (ORDER BY t),2) AS `Cumulative net` FROM (SELECT STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(DATE_FORMAT(booked_date,'%Y-%m'),'-01'),'%Y-%m-%d') t, SUM(base_amount) net FROM transactions WHERE (account_id IN ('ing-checking','ing-card') OR (account_id LIKE 'ing-sav-%' AND account_id<>'ing-sav-k797')) AND $__timeFilter(booked_date) GROUP BY 1) x ORDER BY t

panels.title: 📥 Income per month — what I earned  (€)

targets.rawSql: SELECT STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(DATE_FORMAT(t.booked_date,'%Y-%m'),'-01'),'%Y-%m-%d') AS time, ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN t.base_amount>0 AND c.kind='income' THEN t.base_amount ELSE 0 END),2) AS Income FROM transactions t LEFT JOIN categories c ON t.category=c.slug WHERE (t.account_id IN ('ing-checking','ing-card') OR (t.account_id LIKE 'ing-sav-%' AND t.account_id<>'ing-sav-k797')) AND $__timeFilter(t.booked_date) GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

panels.title: 🏦 My savings this year  (I emptied them to cover overspending)  ·  €

targets.rawSql: SELECT t AS time, ROUND((SELECT -SUM(base_amount) FROM transactions WHERE account_id LIKE 'ing-sav-%' AND account_id<>'ing-sav-k797' AND booked_date>'2025-05-07') + SUM(net) OVER (ORDER BY t),0) AS `Savings` FROM (SELECT STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(DATE_FORMAT(booked_date,'%Y-%m'),'-01'),'%Y-%m-%d') t, SUM(base_amount) net FROM transactions WHERE account_id LIKE 'ing-sav-%' AND account_id<>'ing-sav-k797' AND $__timeFilter(booked_date) GROUP BY 1) x ORDER BY t

panels.title: 📊 Spending by category — per month (top 10, stacked)  ·  €

targets.rawSql: SELECT STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(DATE_FORMAT(t.booked_date,'%Y-%m'),'-01'),'%Y-%m-%d') AS time, COALESCE(top.category,'other') AS metric, ROUND(-SUM(t.base_amount),2) AS value FROM transactions t JOIN categories c ON t.category=c.slug LEFT JOIN (SELECT category FROM transactions WHERE (account_id IN ('ing-checking','ing-card') OR (account_id LIKE 'ing-sav-%' AND account_id<>'ing-sav-k797')) AND base_amount<0 AND booked_date>=DATE_SUB(CURDATE(),INTERVAL 13 MONTH) GROUP BY category ORDER BY SUM(base_amount) ASC LIMIT 10) top ON top.category=t.category WHERE c.kind='expense' AND (t.account_id IN ('ing-checking','ing-card') OR (t.account_id LIKE 'ing-sav-%' AND t.account_id<>'ing-sav-k797')) AND NOT (t.account_id='ing-checking' AND t.payee_raw LIKE '%Incasso ING creditcard%') AND $__timeFilter(t.booked_date) GROUP BY 1,2 ORDER BY 1

panels.title: 📊 What changed — where my spending shifted (Jan–Jun 2025 vs 2026)

targets.rawSql: SELECT CASE cat WHEN 'online-shopping' THEN 'Online shopping' WHEN 'REDACTED_358be28b' THEN 'Apps & subscriptions' WHEN 'electronics-homelab' THEN 'Gear / electronics' WHEN 'groceries' THEN 'Food (groceries)' WHEN 'takeaway-delivery' THEN 'Takeaway' WHEN 'health-insurance-nn' THEN 'Health insurance' WHEN 'internet-mobile' THEN 'Internet / mobile' WHEN 'water-dunea' THEN 'Water' WHEN 'supplements-fitness' THEN 'Supplements' WHEN 'loans' THEN 'Loan payments' ELSE cat END AS `Category`, CONCAT('€ ', FORMAT(y25,0,'de_DE')) AS `Jan–Jun 2025`, CONCAT('€ ', FORMAT(y26,0,'de_DE')) AS `Jan–Jun 2026`, CONCAT(IF(y26-y25>=0,'▲ +€ ','▼ −€ '), FORMAT(ABS(y26-y25),0,'de_DE')) AS `Change` FROM (SELECT category AS cat, ROUND(-SUM(IF(booked_date BETWEEN '2025-01-01' AND '2025-06-30',base_amount,0)),0) AS y25, ROUND(-SUM(IF(booked_date BETWEEN '2026-01-01' AND '2026-06-30',base_amount,0)),0) AS y26 FROM transactions WHERE base_amount<0 AND category IS NOT NULL AND (account_id IN ('ing-checking','ing-card','paypal','ing-parents') OR (account_id LIKE 'ing-sav-%' AND account_id<>'ing-sav-k797')) AND category NOT IN ('transfer','greece-family','cash','card-spending','mortgage','electric-gas','taxes','disability-supp-asr') GROUP BY category) t WHERE ABS(y26-y25)>=60 ORDER BY ABS(y26-y25) DESC LIMIT 10

panels.title: 🔄 Bank sync

targets.rawSql: SELECT TIMESTAMPDIFF(SECOND, MAX(last_synced_at), NOW()) v FROM sync_state WHERE mode='gocardless'

panels.title: 🔐 Days left before I re-approve the bank

targets.rawSql: SELECT DATEDIFF(MIN(access_expires_at), NOW()) v FROM sync_state WHERE access_expires_at IS NOT NULL
